subcodes.first_line: O seeker of Divine good-pleasure! The gaze of providential favour hath ever encompassed thee and shall continue to do so through His glorious bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب رضای الهی لم یزل نظر عنایت شامل تو بوده و خواهد بود از الطاف جلیله
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @call to action, @wisdom [hikmat]
